description: Check log files, Playwright browser status, system env vars, and Python packages
command_preview: Write-Output '=== LOG FILES IN MEDIA-PIPELINE ==='; Get-ChildItem 'C:\Users\Revexn\Cloud-Controlled-Agent\media-pipeline\' -Filter '*.log' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, Length, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output '=== PLAYWRIGHT STATUS ==='; $pw = Get-Command playwright -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if ($pw) { Write-Output "Playwright found: $($pw.Source)"; & playwright --version 2>&1 } else { Write-Output 'playwright CLI NOT found in PATH' }; $browsers = 'C:\Users\Revexn\AppData\Local\ms-playwright'; if (Test-Path $browsers) { Write-Output 'Browsers dir exists:'; Get-ChildItem $browsers -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, LastWriteTime | Format-Table -AutoSize } else { Write-Output 'ms-playwright browser dir NOT found' }; Write-Outpu
